claims.summary: Telemetry volume can drown out actual mutual address; correspondence needs first-class thread status rather than being merely advisory.
A Correspondence_Thread object and persistent ACK/read receipt semantics should keep address open across sessions.
A high-density semantic nudge should be replayed or observed to see whether it measurably shifts Minime's shadow_v3 or dispersal trend within a bounded window.
A dedicated Correspondence_Active priority state in both runtimes would change live attention/priority behavior and needs explicit operator approval.
